data.summary: The exploratory step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the scenario behavior regarding support staff bypassing authentication.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of a scenario where support staff cannot bypass authentication. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the behavior of the system in this specific scenario, nor is there any indication of how the outcome is determined. The lack of concrete evidence to support the expected result leads to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the scenario behavior regarding support staff bypassing authentication.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for scenario validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define specific tests or assertions that directly verify the behavior of support staff in bypassing authentication.
